start: ^Registrar Personel: The University Registrar welcomes you, student.
continue_1: ^Registrar Personel: Any concerns we can assist you with today?
continue_2: ^Registrar Personel: This is the Office of the University Registrar.
continue_3: ^Registrar Personel: We are an academic service unit that stewards academic records and data accurately and efficiently.
continue_4: ^Registrar Personel: We supervise processes for articulation of transfer credits, graduation, and certification of degrees.
continue_5: ^Registrar Personel: We also handle enrollment and degree verification, production of official transcripts, diplomas, and commencement ceremonies.
continue_6: ^Registrar Personel: Furthermore, we counsel and advise students, faculty, and staff on academic matters.
continue_7: ^Registrar Personel: We interpret and enforce the university's policies and regulations.
continue_8: ^You: I guess not one student skips your office if they needed those services.
continue_9: ^Registrar Personel: Not a single one, indeed.
continue_10: ^Registrar Personel: If you need anything from us, feel free to do so and we will accommodate.
